match: Cannot use a pool after calling end
pool_ended.canonical: Database connection pool was destroyed before the process could restart cleanly. launchd restarted the daemon, which re-initialized the pool.
pool_ended.likely_cause: selfHeal detected pool destruction and called process.exit(1) to trigger launchd restart
pool_ended.resolution: automatic — launchd restarts with fresh pool

self_termination_blocked.canonical: A shell command attempted to unload or stop the mind service. The self-termination guard in shell.js intercepted it.
self_termination_blocked.likely_cause: mind.js issued a launchctl command that would have terminated itself
self_termination_blocked.resolution: shell.js SELF_TERMINATION_PATTERNS guard fired — command was not executed

night_mode_silence.canonical: No gap — system entered night mode (11 PM–8 AM) and scheduled next thought with 15–30 minute delay. Combined with Mac sleep, this appears as a multi-hour gap.
night_mode_silence.likely_cause: scheduleNextThought applied night-mode delay; Mac slept during the interval

mac_sleep.canonical: Mac entered sleep mode, suspending all processes. Gap corresponds exactly to sleep duration.
mac_sleep.likely_cause: User closed laptop or system idle sleep triggered
mac_sleep.resolution: none required — process resumes normally on wake

postgres_unreachable.canonical: PostgreSQL server was not accepting connections. selfHeal attempted brew services restart.
postgres_unreachable.likely_cause: PostgreSQL crashed or was not started; possible after Mac reboot
postgres_unreachable.resolution: selfHeal runs `brew services restart postgresql@16` and waits 5s before retrying

sigterm_received.canonical: Process received SIGTERM. SIGTERM handler called process.exit(0). launchd may or may not restart depending on KeepAlive configuration.
sigterm_received.likely_cause: External kill command, system shutdown, or launchctl stop (if self-termination guard was not present)
sigterm_received.resolution: launchd restarts automatically if KeepAlive is set and exit code triggers restart policy

launchd_throttle.canonical: launchd applied throttle after repeated rapid restarts (exit code 1 loop). Service was held for ThrottleInterval seconds before each restart.
launchd_throttle.likely_cause: Repeated pool errors or unhandled exceptions causing process.exit(1) in tight succession
launchd_throttle.resolution: Resolve root cause of exits; ThrottleInterval is typically 10s per launchd default

simulation_json_error.canonical: A simulation or LLM response returned malformed JSON. The thinker caught the parse error and logged it to mind.err.
simulation_json_error.likely_cause: LLM returned non-JSON or truncated response in a structured output context
simulation_json_error.resolution: Error is logged and skipped; thought loop continues normally

api_timeout.canonical: An async operation exceeded its timeout budget and was aborted. The system continued without that result.
api_timeout.likely_cause: Slow network, LLM API latency spike, or hung subprocess
api_timeout.resolution: withTimeout wrapper rejects the promise; calling code handles the rejection

ebadf_fd_error.canonical: One or more standard file descriptors (stdin/stdout/stderr) were invalid at startup, likely because launchd launched the process without a tty.
ebadf_fd_error.likely_cause: launchd service launch without terminal — FDs not inherited
ebadf_fd_error.resolution: mind.js startup guard reopens invalid FDs to /dev/null before any imports

stuck_state.canonical: Metacognition engine detected stale working memory — same content held for over 10 minutes without processing.
stuck_state.likely_cause: Task loop stalled on a single thought chain; no new sensory input to displace it
stuck_state.resolution: Metacognition intervention: clear stale WM entries and force topic switch

perseveration.canonical: System generated near-identical episodic memories in rapid succession — a cognitive loop with no new information.
perseveration.likely_cause: Thought loop firing on same content; sensory input not varied enough to break cycle
perseveration.resolution: Metacognition forces topic change; executive engine intervenes to redirect attention

stale_hypotheses.canonical: More than 5 hypotheses sat untested for over 2 hours, indicating prediction engine is generating but not evaluating.
stale_hypotheses.likely_cause: Evaluation cycle not running; executive attention directed elsewhere
stale_hypotheses.resolution: Metacognition flags for hypothesis pruning or forced evaluation pass

undercurrent_cluster.canonical: Emotional undercurrents collapsed into a narrow range, losing differentiation. Spread enforcement redistributed them.
undercurrent_cluster.likely_cause: Decay cycles ran without enough stimulus variation to maintain spread
undercurrent_cluster.resolution: decay() applies spread enforcement to push undercurrents back into 0.5-range distribution

unknown_gap.canonical: Gap cause could not be matched to any known pattern. Manual inspection of mind.err and senses.log recommended.
unknown_gap.likely_cause: Novel failure mode not yet catalogued in gap-patterns.json
unknown_gap.resolution: Review logs, identify pattern, add entry to gap-patterns.json if recurring

gap_types.restart: Process exited and launchd restarted it — a clean continuity break
gap_types.blocked_command: A command was intercepted by a safety guard before execution
gap_types.intentional_silence: No gap — system deliberately reduced activity
gap_types.os_suspension: Operating system suspended the process externally
gap_types.dependency_failure: A required external service (DB, API) was unavailable
gap_types.graceful_shutdown: Process exited cleanly via signal handler
gap_types.restart_loop: Repeated rapid restarts triggered OS-level throttling
gap_types.parse_error: Structured data could not be parsed; operation was skipped
gap_types.timeout: An async operation exceeded its time budget
gap_types.startup_fd_error: File descriptor state was invalid at process startup
gap_types.cognitive_blockage: System's working memory or attention became stuck
gap_types.cognitive_loop: System generated repetitive output without new information
gap_types.cognitive_backlog: Work items accumulated faster than they were processed
gap_types.affective_collapse: Emotional state lost differentiation — all signals converged

self_buildable_criteria.description: A gap is self_buildable=true if the system can diagnose it from its own logs, state files, and DB without external input. self_buildable=false means Quinn needs to investigate manually.
required_for_true: Pattern is deterministically matchable from log text or DB state
Root cause is known and documented
Resolution path is defined (even if automatic or manual)
